data.title: Kearney's 2026 FDI Confidence Index® finds investors recalibrating strategies amid geopolitical tension and industrial policy expansion
data.description: Findings from the latest survey conducted in January 2026 provide insight into investor attitudes. For the first time in over ten years, Asia has the highest number of ranked markets on the primary Index. The key factor influencing investment decisions is identified as technological advancements and innovation capabilities.

data.title: Decisions of UPM-Kymmene Corporation's Annual General Meeting
data.description: UPM-Kymmene Corporation held its Annual General Meeting on April 9, 2026, in Helsinki. During the meeting, key decisions were made regarding the company's operations moving forward. Shareholders and stakeholders gathered to discuss important matters affecting the corporation. The Annual General Meeting (AGM) was held in accordance with the regulations, with a precise agenda outlining the topics of discussion. The AGM took place on April 9, 2026, in Helsinki, at 16:15 EEST. The decisions made during this meeting will significantly impact the direction and strategies of UPM-Kymmene Corporation going forward.

data.title: Simpplr Named a Leader in Analyst Evaluation of Intranet Platforms, Q2 2026
data.description: Simpplr, a REDWOOD CITY-based company, has recently been recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Intranet Platforms, Q2 2026. Utilizing AI technology, their intranet system has been designed to streamline the digital workplace. This prestigious accolade places them among the top vendors in the industry. This news was announced on April 9, 2026, showcasing their commitment to providing innovative solutions for businesses.
NISSAN WILL CONSIDER EXTENDING THIS CHANGE THROUGH JUNE OR LATER - NIKKEI

data.title: Cvent Named Platinum Employer on Inaugural Where You Work Matters List, Also Earns 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces Honor
data.description: In Tysons, Virginia, Cvent is recognized as a leading employer prioritizing its workforce, as affirmed by independent data on the independent workforce and feedback from employees. In the current era of AI-driven advancements, Cvent stands out as a people-first employer committed to its employees.

data.title: Bridgepointe Technologies Announces Strategic Growth Investment From Charlesbank Capital Partners and Carlyle AlpInvest
data.description: In SAN MATEO, California, technology advisory firm Bridgepointe Technologies revealed a significant growth investment led by Charlesbank Capital Partners, placing the Company's value at more than $1 billion. Charlesbank, an existing investor, will be joined by Carlyle AlpInvest in this strategic investment. This transaction stands out as one of the most substantial recent investments in the technology services distribution sector, showcasing the strong potential in this market.

data.title: Q2 Named a 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces Winner
data.description: Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:QTWO), a prominent provider of digital transformation solutions for financial services based in Austin, Texas, has proudly received the prestigious 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award. This accolade is bestowed upon organizations boasting 150 or more employees who have successfully cultivated outstanding, employee-centric cultures. The recipients are selected through genuine feedback from employees collected in a survey conducted by Energage. The evaluation is based on how employees respond to various statements, reflecting the company's commitment to creating a positive work environment.

data.title: Trend Toward Cloud-native Core Insurance Platforms Boosts Duck Creek Adoption
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, insurers are quickly embracing the Duck Creek software platform and associated services to replace outdated systems and create agile operations, according to ISG. This shift is indicative of a growing trend within the industry, with a significant number of companies transitioning to modern solutions like Duck Creek to enhance their processes. This demonstrates a strong demand for digital transformation and innovation in the insurance sector, with numerous firms recognizing the benefits of upgrading their technology infrastructure for improved efficiency and competitiveness.

data.title: Welldoc Partners with b.well to Advance Interoperability and Seamless Patient Health Record Access
data.description: Welldoc, a prominent AI-powered cardiometabolic health solutions provider, has recently revealed a strategic collaboration with b.well Connected Health. The latter's health data management platform is responsible for fueling the country’s most massive consumer-mediated health data network, linking approximately 2.4 million providers and 350 health plans. This partnership will grant Welldoc access to patient-approved health data on an unparalleled scale. This access will facilitate the delivery of more comprehensive and individualized health insights and services.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Vault 44.01/
data.description: Vault 44.01 has officially been granted approval for the construction of the first Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) project in Indiana, making it a significant milestone for the state's environmental efforts. This approval includes an EPA Class VI permit, demonstrating compliance with strict environmental regulations. This project signifies a major step towards reducing carbon emissions, with an estimated investment of $50 million and the potential to capture and store over 500,000 tons of carbon dioxide annually. It is a significant development in the realm of sustainable energy practices and could have far-reaching impacts on the region's environmental initiatives. For further information and details, refer to the updated news release.

data.title: Global Times: Feeling the city of the future: In Xiong'an, innovation is born and comes alive
data.description: On April 9, 2026 in Beijing, the Xiong'an New Area in Hebei Province, North China appears clean and new at first sight. However, the true impact of this area becomes evident when driving through it. Referred to as a significant development in China, the Xiong'an New Area showcases a modern infrastructure and a promising future.

data.title: ADS-TEC Energy and Elanga bring ultra-fast charging to Penske dealership in Australia
data.description: ADS-TEC Energy PLC and Elanga, in partnership, have successfully set up a battery-buffered ultra-fast charger at a Penske Automotive Group dealership in Brighton, Australia. This charger, installed in place of a 150 kW DC fast charger, showcases the ability to implement high-power charging swiftly in areas with restricted grid capacity. The joint effort between ADS-TEC Energy PLC and Elanga, with their NASDAQ-listed partner, has resulted in the deployment of cutting-edge charging technology at this automotive site.

data.title: Marco's Pizza Spotlights Magnifico Line with $12.99 Offer
data.description: In Toledo, Ohio, on April 9, 2026, Marco's Pizza is promoting their fresh dough, signature sauces, and bold flavors by offering a special deal with the promo code GETMAG. This initiative aims to showcase the quality and value that Marco's Pizza offers. As one of the rapidly expanding pizza chains in the country, Marco's is urging customers to try the unique Magnifico experience. This promotion highlights the company's dedication to providing exceptional taste and affordability to its customers.

data.title: Matrix Powers a Bold New Hair Era for KATSEYE, Celebrating the Power of Transformation
data.description: On April 9, 2026, in New York, Matrix, a renowned professional hair color and care brand, announced its continued collaboration with Global Brand Ambassadors, KATSEYE, as they embark on a new era in haircare. This partnership has reached a significant milestone as they advance into the next phase of their journey.

data.title: Tanium Wins 2026 Cybersecurity Excellence Award for Best Cybersecurity Company
data.description: In Emeryville, California, Tanium, a prominent player in Autonomous IT, revealed that it has achieved the Silver Award in the Best Cybersecurity Company segment at the 2026 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards. Organized by Cybersecurity Insiders, these annual awards highlight companies, technologies, and individuals showcasing outstanding performance, creativity, and guidance in the realm of cybersecurity. Tanium received accolades for its pioneering efforts in combining IT operations and security.
